non_blocking_notes: `npm test -- --run tests/unit/guardianToken.test.ts tests/convex/guardianConsent.test.ts` and `npm run build` could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vitest/Astro attempted to write generated files. Gate 5 still needs a normal writable build/test run.
Targeted secret scan found env var names and test dummy values only, no committed secrets.
No em dashes found in added guardian/member-facing source strings; the AFG arrow is from the vault copy.
The checked-in `.codex/audits/guardian-consent.review.json` is an older DO-NOT-SHIP artifact; the orchestrator should overwrite it with this verdict before merge.

spec_compliance.criterion: AC1 guardian email sent at the right moment with vault copy
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/auth.ts:168-174` schedules `internal.guardians.sendGuardianEmail` when a verified minor reaches `pending_guardian`; `convex/guardians.ts:101-263` validates pending minor state, rotates the token, and sends the vault subject/body through Resend.

`convex/lib/guardianToken.ts:9-24` generates 128-bit tokens and stores SHA-256 hashes; `lookupGuardianToken` is read-only and neutral for invalid/expired/used tokens, while `confirmGuardianConsent` is the explicit mutation. Expiry is enforced and scheduled.

spec_compliance.criterion: AC3 confirmation activates member, certificate, and audit
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/guardians.ts:527-560` patches guardian proof fields, member age/lifecycle fields, writes confirmation and lifecycle audit rows, and issues the certificate within the mutation.

`resendGuardianEmail` resolves the signed-in member server-side, enforces 1/hour and 3/day member buckets plus the shared global bucket, rotates tokens, audits refusals/failures, and rolls back failed sends so the last delivered link remains valid.
`src/portal/Dashboard.tsx:140-210` renders the active minor certificate plus Aviation for Girls signpost and bypasses adult tiles, settings, directory, pipeline, opportunities, and mentorship UI.
Guardian email and youth-dashboard copy materially match the cited vault drafts with placeholder/link substitutions; no member-facing em dashes were found.
No at-18 graduation flow, guardian revocation portal, event/photo reconfirmation, or admin pending-guardian queue was added.

`tests/unit/guardianToken.test.ts` covers token generation/hash/expiry; `tests/convex/guardianConsent.test.ts` covers send, confirmation, lookup safety, expiry, idempotency, resend throttle, rotation, rollback, and audit paths; E2E shell coverage was added in `tests/e2e/trust-pages.spec.ts`.

summary: No ship-blocking authorization, safeguarding, token, resend, audit, data-leakage, secret, or spec-delivery issue found in the current diff. Remaining verification gap is environmental: build/test must run in a writable Gate 5 environment.
